예레미야 30:1.content: The word that came to Jeremiah from Yahweh, saying,

예레미야 30:2.content: “Yahweh, the God of Israel, says, ‘Write all the words that I have spoken to you in a book.

예레미야 30:3.content: For, behold, the days come,’ says Yahweh, ‘that I will reverse the captivity of my people Israel and Judah,’ says Yahweh. ‘I will cause them to return to the land that I gave to their fathers, and they will possess it.’ ”

예레미야 30:4.content: These are the words that Yahweh spoke concerning Israel and concerning Judah.

예레미야 30:5.content: For Yahweh says: “We have heard a voice of trembling; a voice of fear, and not of peace.

예레미야 30:6.content: Ask now, and see whether a man travails with child. Why do I see every man with his hands on his waist, as a woman in travail, and all faces are turned pale?

예레미야 30:7.content: Alas! for that day is great, so that none is like it. It is even the time of Jacob’s trouble; but he will be saved out of it.

예레미야 30:8.content: It will come to pass in that day, says Yahweh of Armies, that I will break his yoke from off your neck, and will burst your bonds. Strangers will no more make them their bondservants;

예레미야 30:9.content: but they will serve Yahweh their God, and David their king, whom I will raise up to them.

예레미야 30:10.content: Therefore don’t be afraid, O Jacob my servant, says Yahweh. Don’t be dismayed, Israel. For, behold, I will save you from afar, and save your offspring from the land of their captivity. Jacob will return, and will be quiet and at ease. No one will make him afraid.

예레미야 30:11.content: For I am with you, says Yahweh, to save you; for I will make a full end of all the nations where I have scattered you, but I will not make a full end of you; but I will correct you in measure, and will in no way leave you unpunished.”

예레미야 30:12.content: For Yahweh says, “Your hurt is incurable. Your wound is grievous.

예레미야 30:13.content: There is no one to plead your cause, that you may be bound up. You have no healing medicines.

예레미야 30:14.content: All your lovers have forgotten you. They don’t seek you. For I have wounded you with the wound of an enemy, with the chastisement of a cruel one, for the greatness of your iniquity, because your sins were increased.

예레미야 30:15.content: Why do you cry over your injury? Your pain is incurable. For the greatness of your iniquity, because your sins have increased, I have done these things to you.

예레미야 30:16.content: Therefore all those who devour you will be devoured. All your adversaries, everyone of them, will go into captivity. Those who plunder you will be plunder. I will make all who prey on you become prey.

예레미야 30:17.content: For I will restore health to you, and I will heal you of your wounds,” says Yahweh; “because they have called you an outcast, saying, ‘It is Zion, whom no man seeks after.’ ”

예레미야 30:18.content: Yahweh says: “Behold, I will reverse the captivity of Jacob’s tents, and have compassion on his dwelling places. The city will be built on its own hill, and the palace will be inhabited in its own place.

예레미야 30:19.content: Thanksgiving will proceed out of them with the voice of those who make merry. I will multiply them, and they will not be few; I will also glorify them, and they will not be small.

예레미야 30:20.content: Their children also will be as before, and their congregation will be established before me. I will punish all who oppress them.

예레미야 30:21.content: Their prince will be one of them, and their ruler will proceed from among them. I will cause him to draw near, and he will approach me; for who is he who has had boldness to approach me?” says Yahweh.

예레미야 30:22.content: “You shall be my people, and I will be your God.

예레미야 30:23.content: Behold, Yahweh’s storm, his wrath, has gone out, a sweeping storm: it will burst on the head of the wicked.

예레미야 30:24.content: The fierce anger of Yahweh will not return until he has accomplished, and until he has performed the intentions of his heart. In the latter days you will understand it.”
